spec_match.rationale: Outstanding coverage of advanced CSS mathematical expressions—demonstrates max(), calc(), and multi-argument env() formulas flawlessly.

interactive.rationale: Splendid customizer workspace featuring numerous checkboxes, strategy dropdowns, a copy button, and a responsive page slider linked to a visual vector canvas.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly aligns with the main goal—providing developers with a production-ready tool to generate conformant stylesheets.

edge_cases.rationale: Thoroughly supports unit systems (cm, mm, in, px) and body margin resets.

references.rationale: Missing the mandatory reference link to the chromestatus.com/feature/5515971464527872 entry.

design_system.rationale: Very cohesive grid containers, using syntax-highlighted classes (.code-kw, .code-cmt, .code-prop) for high contrast code readability.

openQuestions.title: Add missing chromestatus.com reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must include a link to the associated ChromeStatus entry. Add a link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5515971464527872 in the references list or crumbs block.

summary: The stylesheet-generator is a fully realized code tool that makes creating print layouts incredibly easy, but fails compliance due to a missing ChromeStatus link.
